perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman holding and eating a white wax apple, followed by a still image of the fruit growing on a tree. (2) She holds up a bowl of several white wax apples, then proceeds to bite into one, showing the white flesh inside; her expressions shift from curiosity to analytical tasting. (3) She then introduces a very small, round watermelon called a 'baseball watermelon'. (4) She bites directly into the watermelon through the skin, showing the red flesh inside, and reacts with genuine surprise at the taste and the fact that the skin is edible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop background music plays continuously throughout the video. (2) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with an excited and friendly tone, introducing the rare fruits. (3) Loud, crisp sound effects (SFX) of fruit being bitten and crunched (ASMR style) are prominently featured during the eating segments. (4) The audio maintains a consistent balance between the vocal narration, the music, and the eating sounds until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '99% 台灣人不知道的水果? 白色蓮霧 & 棒球西瓜' (Functional Hook: Curiosity-inducing title). (2) '在海外已經很多人在吃的白色蓮霧?' (Functional: Subtitle). (3) '實測歐膩' (Decorative: Channel/character brand sticker). (4) '長得像牙齒' (Decorative: Description of the wax apple shape). (5) '棒球西瓜' (Functional: Identifying the mini watermelon). (6) '皮真的可以吃' (Decorative: Surprised reaction text). (7) '好甜喔!!!!!' (Decorative: High-energy emotional feedback).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Wax Apple Review -> Transition -> Watermelon Review -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing as the host
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a dark blue ribbed top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple, well-lit indoor environment with a plain white or neutral-colored wall behind the creator.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction of Item A -> Sensory Test A -> Introduction of Item B -> Sensory Test B -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce and review two uncommon fruit varieties (white wax apple and mini 'baseball' watermelon) to a Taiwanese audience. By focusing on the unique appearance and the surprising 'edible skin' of the watermelon, the content seeks to entertain and educate viewers about rare food items through an energetic first-person review.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator describes buying the fruit in a 'strange place' and focuses on the fruit variety itself rather than a specific brand or seller.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of the '實測歐膩' (Testing Unnie) branding sticker and high-contrast text hooks.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'Discovery' sub-genre of food vlogging, where the value is provided by showing something rare or visually unexpected (white versions of red fruit, tiny versions of large fruit).
